message:
🌱 Add opentelemetry-collector: Support default values for configuration environment mission (#1570)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,78 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "opentelemetry-collector-5228-support-default-values-for-configuration-environmen",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "opentelemetry-collector: Support default values for configuration environment variables",
+    "description": "Support default values for configuration environment variables. Requested by 8+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current opentelemetry-collector deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your opentelemetry-collector version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n opentelemetry-collector -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-collector\nhelm list -n opentelemetry-collector 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working opentelemetry-collector installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review opentelemetry-collector configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant opentelemetry-collector configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n opentelemetry-collector -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-collector\nkubectl get configmap -n opentelemetry-collector -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=opentelemetry-collector\n```\nWhen using [Configuration Environment Variables](https://opentelemetry.io/docs/collector/configuration/#configuration-environment-variables), \n\n**if a variable is NOT SET on otelcol start, the value will be empty and probably break"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Support default values for configuration environment…",
+        "description": "I don't get the same error as you do. With this configuration file:\n\n<details>\n<summary>Config file (click to expand)</summary>\n\n```yaml\nreceivers:\n  nop:\n\nexporters:\n  nop:\n\nprocessors:\n  memory_limiter:\n    check_interval: 2s\n    limit_mib: ${OTEL_MEMORY_LIMIT_MIB}\n\nservice:\n  pipelines:\n   \n```yaml\nprocessors:\n  attributes/example:\n    actions:\n      - key: \"${DB_KEY:CustomerDefaultKey}\"\n        action: \"${OPERATION:CustomerDefaultOperation}\"\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n opentelemetry-collector -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-collector\nkubectl get events -n opentelemetry-collector --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Support default values for configuration environment…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "I don't get the same error as you do. With this configuration file:\n\n<details>\n<summary>Config file (click to expand)</summary>\n\n```yaml\nreceivers:\n  nop:\n\nexporters:\n  nop:\n\nprocessors:\n  memory_limiter:\n    check_interval: 2s\n    limit_mib: ${OTEL_MEMORY_LIMIT_MIB}\n\nservice:\n  pipelines:\n    metrics:\n        receivers: [nop]\n        exporters: [nop]\n        processors:",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "processors:\n  attributes/example:\n    actions:\n      - key: \"${DB_KEY:CustomerDefaultKey}\"\n        action: \"${OPERATION:CustomerDefaultOperation}\"",
+        "exporters:\n  jaeger:\n    endpoint: my_default_server:14250",
+        "export OTELCOL_EXPORTERS_JAEGER_ENDPOINT=some_other_server:23456"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "opentelemetry-collector",
+      "incubating",
+      "observability",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "opentelemetry-collector"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Service"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-collector/issues/5228",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-collector"
+    },
+    "reactions": 8,
+    "comments": 15,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with opentelemetry-collector installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-20T06:31:02.055Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
